name.description: Unprefixed package name, for example fast-mode. The npm package name defaults to @scope/pi-fast-mode.
name.x-prompt: What Pi package would you like to create?
name.x-hint: Do not include the pi- prefix unless you want to override normalization.

description.description: Package description written to package.json and README.md.

importPath.description: Npm package name. Defaults to the workspace scope plus pi-<name>, for example @scope/pi-fast-mode.

repositoryUrl.description: Git repository URL for package metadata. Defaults to git origin; required in non-interactive mode when origin is missing or ambiguous.
